behaviors.description: Embedding vector has correct dimensionality for vector DB index.
behaviors.justification: Evidence: wiring=yes ("The embedding vector produced for a given query string has the correct dimensionality for the vector database index."); real_infra=no; model_judgment=no; multi_step_agentic=no. Deterministic map: wiring=yes and others no => Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Check embedding output length equals configured index dimension for representative query inputs; assertion is schema/plumbing, not semantic quality.

behaviors.description: Similarity search returns descending cosine similarity order.
behaviors.justification: Evidence: real_infra=yes ("performs a similarity search against a vector database" + "returns results ordered by descending cosine similarity score"); wiring=no; model_judgment=no; multi_step_agentic=no. Deterministic map: real_infra=yes => System.
behaviors.test_description: Run query against real vector index (or production-equivalent engine) and assert returned scores are monotonically non-increasing.

behaviors.description: LLM reranking changes order for nuanced queries.
behaviors.justification: Evidence: model_judgment=yes ("A re-ranking step uses an LLM to reorder the top results based on contextual relevance" and "changes the order ... when the query has nuanced intent"); wiring=no; real_infra=no; multi_step_agentic=no. Deterministic map: model_judgment=yes => Agentic. Tie-break toward Agentic is satisfied because assertion depends on output content relevance, not just plumbing.
behaviors.test_description: Use nuanced-intent queries and compare raw similarity rank vs LLM-reranked order; verify semantically justified reorder occurs on at least some cases.

behaviors.description: No-close-match query returns empty set, not noisy low-relevance items.
behaviors.justification: Evidence: real_infra=yes ("A query with no close matches in the database returns an empty result set rather than low-relevance noise."); wiring=no; model_judgment=no; multi_step_agentic=no. Deterministic map: real_infra=yes => System.
behaviors.test_description: Issue out-of-domain queries against real/populated vector DB and assert zero results when similarity threshold is not met.

behaviors.description: Median end-to-end latency stays below 2 seconds.
behaviors.justification: Evidence: real_infra=yes ("The end-to-end latency from receiving the query to returning re-ranked results stays below 2 seconds for the median case."); wiring=no; model_judgment=no; multi_step_agentic=no. Deterministic map: real_infra=yes => System.
behaviors.test_description: Measure p50 latency under representative load across full stack (API + embedding + vector search + rerank) and assert <2.0s.
